OK
COMPONENTS 1 SIZES 100
PATH DIST 270 NODES P0001 P0002 P0003 P0004 P0005 P0006 P0007 P0008 P0009 P0010 P0011 P0012 P0013 P0014 P0015 P0016 P0017 P0018 P0019 P0020 P0021 P0022 P0023 P0024 P0025 P0026 P0027 P0028 P0029 P0030 P0031 P0032 P0033 P0034 P0035 P0036 P0037 P0038 P0039 P0040 P0041 P0042 P0043 P0044 P0045 P0046 P0047 P0048 P0049 P0050 P0100
PATH TIME 50 NODES P0001 P0002 P0003 P0004 P0005 P0006 P0007 P0008 P0009 P0010 P0011 P0012 P0013 P0014 P0015 P0016 P0017 P0018 P0019 P0020 P0021 P0022 P0023 P0024 P0025 P0026 P0027 P0028 P0029 P0030 P0031 P0032 P0033 P0034 P0035 P0036 P0037 P0038 P0039 P0040 P0041 P0042 P0043 P0044 P0045 P0046 P0047 P0048 P0049 P0050 P0100
PATH DIST 270 NODES P0001 P0002 P0003 P0004 P0005 P0006 P0007 P0008 P0009 P0010 P0011 P0012 P0013 P0014 P0015 P0016 P0017 P0018 P0019 P0020 P0021 P0022 P0023 P0024 P0025 P0026 P0027 P0028 P0029 P0030 P0031 P0032 P0033 P0034 P0035 P0036 P0037 P0038 P0039 P0040 P0041 P0042 P0043 P0044 P0045 P0046 P0047 P0048 P0049 P0050 P0100
MST 521 EDGES P0001-P0002:3 P0001-P0051:10 P0002-P0003:1 P0002-P0052:10 P0003-P0004:4 P0003-P0053:5 P0004-P0005:8 P0004-P0054:1 P0005-P0006:7 P0005-P0055:1 P0006-P0007:8 P0006-P0056:4 P0007-P0008:9 P0007-P0057:5 P0008-P0009:10 P0008-P0058:3 P0009-P0010:3 P0009-P0059:3 P0010-P0011:8 P0010-P0060:8 P0011-P0012:2 P0011-P0061:8 P0012-P0013:2 P0012-P0062:8 P0013-P0014:4 P0013-P0063:6 P0014-P0015:1 P0014-P0064:3 P0015-P0016:5 P0015-P0065:5 P0016-P0017:4 P0016-P0066:3 P0017-P0018:7 P0017-P0067:8 P0018-P0019:3 P0018-P0068:5 P0019-P0020:7 P0019-P0069:8 P0020-P0021:1 P0020-P0070:2 P0021-P0022:7 P0021-P0071:5 P0022-P0023:2 P0022-P0072:2 P0023-P0024:7 P0023-P0073:5 P0024-P0025:1 P0024-P0074:2 P0025-P0026:5 P0025-P0075:3 P0026-P0027:10 P0026-P0076:9 P0027-P0028:9 P0027-P0077:4 P0028-P0029:9 P0028-P0078:2 P0029-P0030:10 P0029-P0079:4 P0030-P0031:3 P0030-P0080:9 P0031-P0032:3 P0031-P0081:6 P0032-P0033:2 P0032-P0082:1 P0033-P0034:7 P0033-P0083:10 P0034-P0035:2 P0034-P0084:3 P0035-P0036:5 P0035-P0085:9 P0036-P0037:9 P0036-P0086:7 P0037-P0038:10 P0037-P0087:7 P0038-P0039:2 P0038-P0088:3 P0039-P0040:4 P0039-P0089:8 P0040-P0041:4 P0040-P0090:6 P0041-P0042:10 P0041-P0091:3 P0042-P0043:7 P0042-P0092:10 P0043-P0044:4 P0043-P0093:4 P0044-P0045:7 P0044-P0094:8 P0045-P0046:10 P0045-P0095:5 P0046-P0047:6 P0046-P0096:4 P0047-P0048:3 P0047-P0097:2 P0048-P0049:9 P0048-P0098:3 P0049-P0050:5 P0049-P0099:1 P0050-P0100:1
CRITICAL NODES 50 P0001 P0002 P0003 P0004 P0005 P0006 P0007 P0008 P0009 P0010 P0011 P0012 P0013 P0014 P0015 P0016 P0017 P0018 P0019 P0020 P0021 P0022 P0023 P0024 P0025 P0026 P0027 P0028 P0029 P0030 P0031 P0032 P0033 P0034 P0035 P0036 P0037 P0038 P0039 P0040 P0041 P0042 P0043 P0044 P0045 P0046 P0047 P0048 P0049 P0050 EDGES 99 P0001-P0002 P0001-P0051 P0002-P0003 P0002-P0052 P0003-P0004 P0003-P0053 P0004-P0005 P0004-P0054 P0005-P0006 P0005-P0055 P0006-P0007 P0006-P0056 P0007-P0008 P0007-P0057 P0008-P0009 P0008-P0058 P0009-P0010 P0009-P0059 P0010-P0011 P0010-P0060 P0011-P0012 P0011-P0061 P0012-P0013 P0012-P0062 P0013-P0014 P0013-P0063 P0014-P0015 P0014-P0064 P0015-P0016 P0015-P0065 P0016-P0017 P0016-P0066 P0017-P0018 P0017-P0067 P0018-P0019 P0018-P0068 P0019-P0020 P0019-P0069 P0020-P0021 P0020-P0070 P0021-P0022 P0021-P0071 P0022-P0023 P0022-P0072 P0023-P0024 P0023-P0073 P0024-P0025 P0024-P0074 P0025-P0026 P0025-P0075 P0026-P0027 P0026-P0076 P0027-P0028 P0027-P0077 P0028-P0029 P0028-P0078 P0029-P0030 P0029-P0079 P0030-P0031 P0030-P0080 P0031-P0032 P0031-P0081 P0032-P0033 P0032-P0082 P0033-P0034 P0033-P0083 P0034-P0035 P0034-P0084 P0035-P0036 P0035-P0085 P0036-P0037 P0036-P0086 P0037-P0038 P0037-P0087 P0038-P0039 P0038-P0088 P0039-P0040 P0039-P0089 P0040-P0041 P0040-P0090 P0041-P0042 P0041-P0091 P0042-P0043 P0042-P0092 P0043-P0044 P0043-P0093 P0044-P0045 P0044-P0094 P0045-P0046 P0045-P0095 P0046-P0047 P0046-P0096 P0047-P0048 P0047-P0097 P0048-P0049 P0048-P0098 P0049-P0050 P0049-P0099 P0050-P0100
